target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; structural debris piled at base; visible collapse of load-bearing elements; damage exceeds 75% of visible target area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The right wing of the building shows complete collapse of its upper floors and roof; structural elements are missing; debris pile indicates total loss of structural integrity; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, both showing extensive structural collapse and debris piles exceeding 75% of visible area. The overall scene depicts a street flanked by heavily damaged multi-story buildings with collapsed roofs, shattered windows, and rubble-strewn ground, with a single car parked in the foreground. The functional impact is likely severe, with the buildings rendered uninhabitable and unusable due to total structural loss.
